name: Cube Zones Texture D3D12
description: XR_EXT_display_zones TEXTURE-class parity test (ADR-027), native D3D12 leg: proves a shared-texture app receives the full multi-zone composite (two 3D zones + Local2D strip + wish mask) written back into its shared D3D12 texture by the native D3D12 compositor, identical to the D3D11 leg (M=wish mode, O=overlap toggle).
